text: A person at home base swings at a baseball.
A brown and white horse is grazing on grass.
A woman is smiling in a kitchen near a pizza on a stove.
a brown cow walking through a grassy field
Two sheep are laying down in a grassy field.
Two laptop computers and one desktop monitor are sitting on the counter.
A flamingo bent over drinking something orange out of a black bowl.
Two ox are pulling a man on a cart.
People packed in the seat of a ski lift while others are on the hill.
Two slices of pizza sit on a plate covered with leafy greens.
